use_cases: Displaying user avatars with automatic fallback in share cards
Creating consistent user profile representations across social features
Building shareable content cards with user attribution
Implementing accessible avatar components in comment and feed systems
ai_summary: Radix UI-based avatar component system providing Avatar, AvatarImage, and AvatarFallback primitives for share card implementations. Features accessible, keyboard-navigable user profile display with automatic image fallback handling and rounded-full styling for social sharing contexts.
